---
name: 🚀 Implementation Task
about: Template for coding new features or logic
title: '🚀 Implementation: [Short Description]'
labels: enhancement, implementation
assignees: ''
---

### 📝 Summary
Briefly describe the functionality to be implemented and the problem it solves.

### 🛠 Technical Specifications
- **Target Branch:** `main` / `develop`
- **Files Affected:** 
  - `path/to/file_a.py`
  - `path/to/file_b.py`
- **Dependencies:** List any new libraries or internal modules required.

### ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Logic implemented according to specifications.
- [ ] Code follows the project's style guide.
- [ ] No regressions introduced in existing features.
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable).

### 🏗 Implementation Steps
1. [ ] Set up the basic structure/boilerplate.
2. [ ] Implement core logic for [Feature X].
3. [ ] Integrate with [Module Y].
4. [ ] Perform manual verification.

### 🔗 Context & Links
- **Parent Issue:** #
- **Design/Architecture Docs:** [Link]
- **API Specs:** [Link]

### 🧪 Definition of Done
- [ ] Code compiles/builds without errors.
- [ ] Unit tests are written and passing.
- [ ] Pull Request created and linked to this issue.
